sections.title: Base
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Aqueous Test, Season Stat Line #/500 or less, Jersey Number #/99 or less. · PRESS PROOF PARALLELS: Blue, Bronze, Green, Red, Yellow, Silver #/100, Silver Die-Cut #/75, Gold #/50, Gold Die-Cut #/25, Black #/10, Black Die-Cut 1/1.

sections.title: Base Rated Rookie
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Aqueous Test, Canvas, Premium, Season Stat Line #/500 or less, Canvas Studio Series #/100, Jersey Number #/97 or less. · PRESS PROOF PARALLELS: Blue, Bronze, Green, Red, Yellow, Silver #/100, Silver Die-Cut #/75, Gold #/50, Gold Die-Cut #/25, Black #/10, Black Die-Cut 1/1.

sections.title: Base Photo Variation
sections.odds: *Variations have "V" printed on the back of the card, with the card number.* · PARALLEL CARDS: Aqueous Test, Season Stat Line #/500 or less, Jersey Number #/99 or less. · PRESS PROOF PARALLELS: Blue, Bronze, Green, Red, Silver #/100, Silver Die-Cut #/75, Gold #/50, Gold Die-Cut #/25, Black #/10, Black Die-Cut 1/1.

sections.title: Rated Rookie Autographs
sections.odds: Benny Snell Jr not in Blue; Parris Campbell not in Green; Campbell, Snell not in Orange; David Montgomery, Hunter Renfrow, Benny Snell Jr. not in Purple; Campbell, Snell Jr., Renfrow, Sternberger not in Bronze; Montgomery, Renfrow not in Red parallel.*

sections.title: Signature Marks Blue
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Green #/25, Purple #/10, Red #/5, Bronze 1/1. · * Ismail only in Purple/Red/Bronze parallels.*

sections.title: Rookie Phenom Jersey Autographs
sections.odds: 20 cards. Serial numbered #/99. · PARALLEL CARDS: Prime #/25, Brand Logo 1/1, NFLPA Logo 1/1, NFL Shield 1/1.
